p.strong: Persistence + nextIndex tracking handle recovery automatically

div.p: currentTerm: 2 votedFor: "" log: [{term:1, cmd:"a"}, {term:1, cmd:"b"}, {term:2, cmd:"c"}] commitIndex: 3
Args { term: 2 prevLogIndex: 3 prevLogTerm: 2 entries: [{term:2, cmd:"d"}, {term:2, cmd:"e"}] leaderCommit: 5 }
Consistency check passes: follower has log[3].term == 2 ✓ Follower appends entries 4 and 5, updates commitIndex.
